creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #5)
Yes, it has been rebuilt. It happens also when doing only kldload linuxkpi, which doesn't involve radeonkms.

Our (PPC devs) hypothesis is that something is wrong and linuxkpi bails out and tries to exit, that's why sysuninit is executed.
